d.question: Which oxides can be made with precursor and how can this be distinguished?
d.answer: d	There is both a silicon atom and a zirconium atom in the precursor, so both SiO2 and ZrO2. In this case ZrO2 is more likely.

a.question: How many valence electrons does silicon have an how can you tell based on the image?
a.answer: a	Silicon atoms have four valence electrons, this can be deduced from the fact that the silicon atoms form four single electron bonds with other atoms.
